title: Avocado Grilled Cilantro Slaw
description: This citrusy, fluffy Avocado Grilled Cilantro Slaw is a kid-friendly, vegan dish inspired by traditional Jamaican flavors.
instructions: Prepare avocados by pitting and slicing them into chunks.
Mix all ingredients except cilantro in a large bowl for the dressing.
Heat a grill pan to medium-high heat (400°F - 425°F).
Once hot, lightly season each avocado chunk with chili powder and salt, then place on the hot grill for 1-2 minutes per side or until charred and softened.
Remove from the grill and let cool slightly before assembling into a salad with remaining dressing and chopped cilantro.
